ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cherry, flesh and skin, pitted, raw
Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant

ingredients_text: dark chocolate 60% [sugar, cocoa mass, cocoa butter, emulsifier E322 (soya), natural vanilla flavoring], filling 40% [glucose-fructose syrup, whole cherry 37%, liqueur 8%, flavoring]. Cocoa solids: 50% minimum. May contain traces of gluten, nuts and milk.
product_name: Pralines with Whole Cherry and Liqueur Filling, 240g
